title: Death of Shayban b. Salamah the Kharijite
description: the Kharijite and the Reason for It According to what has been reported the reason for his death is as follows. 'Ali b. Juday ' and Shayban had joined forces to fight Nasr b. Sayyar because of Shayban 's hostility to Nasr. This was because he

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 27
